# Important Dates

- **Application deadline:** April 30, 2026 (AoE)
- **Notification of acceptance:** Mid-to-late May 2026
- **Workshop dates:** July 27–31, 2026

# Schedule

::: {.schedule-wrap}

| Time | Monday | Tuesday | Wednesday | Thursday | Friday |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 09:00–10:30 | Opening + participant lightning talks | Bayesian inference foundations | SBI tools and demos | Complex and joint modeling | Group reports |
| 10:45–12:15 | Intro talks by organizers | Bayesian/SBI methods talks | Software talks | Advanced methods talks | Project presentations + discussion |
| 12:15–13:30 | Lunch | Lunch | Lunch | Lunch | Closing lunch |
| 13:30–15:00 | Breakout group formation | PyMC tutorial + hands-on workshop | Dynamics modeling workshop | Joint modeling workshop | Future directions + opportunities |
| 15:15–16:30 | Welcome reception | Breakout meetings + Q&A | Poster session | Panel discussion + social event | Farewell |

:::
